text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I knew the sun would feel hotter here, but
it's even worse when I think about how I still have
another five laps to go.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Heeey, Mackie! We gotta do this crab walk stamp rally! That or play a game of card-flip!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-why are you dressed as if we're here to play games?! The purpose of summer camp is to train!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But we're at the beach! There's a huge mess of
things more important to do!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Like writing a poem in the sand that reconciles
quantum mechanics and relativity! Or fighting
over real estate with hermit crabs!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Enough of that. Save your inane ideas until we've
finished training!
choice_data_list: You heard her. Let's stop bothering McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Geeeez, what's up with you two? Just what do
you think the ocean's here for?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... All right, now for thirty dash runs—hm?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship?! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Agh, eeegh! S-somebody give me w-water... and
worms...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I-I've only got water! Here, drink this, quickly!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aaah... I owe you my life, friend! Please, you must
let me repay you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to take you to Gol-Chateau... If you do
not come, I will be cursed to split invisible
watermelons for eternity!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What kind of ridiculous curse is that?! Ugh... You
just want me to go with you, correct? Fine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea a place like this was right near
camp... And is that what it appears to be? A food
stall with a mountain of corn?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It certainly is. Corn is Gol-Chateau's most famous
commodity. First things first—we'd better get to
grilling!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, I would love to eat, but—I mean, that is
very generous of you, but we shouldn't eat in the
middle of training.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah, unfortunately, you can't decline. You see, now that you've entered Gol-Chateau, you're to be part of the reception games, and hospitality is mandatory!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There's only one way to leave. You have to play
each and every reception event with me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Goodness. I suppose I'm the fool for following
you here. I can't believe I'm about to do this.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeah! Look at us, getting a full combo in
Gol-Chateau's traditional sea bream dance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Heavy panting... I have no clue what any of that had to do with sea breams... Anyway, what's next?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We're playing nothing-but-bunker golf! Only 564
events left! I hate to say it, but it looks like we're
almost done!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: 564 left?! We're not the slightest bit done!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Haven't we played enough? If we do every event,
we won't make it back until next century!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What? But we're just getting to the good stuff!
Come back, Big Maaack!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Ah, what a refreshing morning... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What is this? Why is there a strange package
outside my door? ...It says "Pandora's box."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff... Cake, donuts, custard? All I smell are ordinary sweets...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Don't be fooled. All but one contain my specially
made sweet, savory, spicy, sour, bitter ball of
all-encompassing flavors... The game begins now,
McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I knew this was your doing! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you're here! Did you see Gold Ship just now?
That scamp has been causing nothing but
mayhem since yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So Gold Ship is still being a thorn in McQueen's
side. Why is she bent on interrupting training this
time, though? Could it be...
choice_data_list: I think... she just wants you to play with her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What?! It couldn't possibly be as simple as that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No, that's entirely plausible for her, isn't it? She's
reached a new level of pure disruption.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I suppose if she only wants a little attention...
Wait, maybe that would have the opposite effect.
What to do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried about letting Gold Ship have her way
unchecked. Should we indulge her or try to calm
her down?
choice_data_list: Let's play whatever games she wants.
Let's distract her and calm her down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I don't want this to get in the way of Mejiro
McQueen's training. I suggest we come up with
some kind of pair work that Gold Ship would like
to do as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship? I came upon a type of training that I
thought you'd enjoy. Would you care to join me?
It's called... um...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! The training that took the west coast by
storm! I'm totally in, let's do it! So we doing
Tokyo or Osaka rules?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship appears to have a great time playing
against Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But someone is going to have to take the brunt of
Gold Ship's pent up energy, and the only other
person around is... me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A-are you certain about this? We're talking about
Gold Ship here—can you take her on by yourself?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Come on, come on! I still haven't squeezed out
every last drop of summer joy! Next up is the
undersea hula hoop party!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as McQueen feared, I quickly become
exhausted... but I somehow manage to keep Gold
Ship's full attention.
